title: Implement canonicalize_display_name in relay
description: Why: central validation point for all user-supplied display names. What: add pub fn canonicalize_display_name(s: &str) -> Result<String, &'static str> to relay/src/ws.rs (or a new relay/src/canonicalize.rs module). Algorithm: (1) apply NFC via unicode_normalization::UnicodeNormalization::nfc().collect::<String>(); (2) scan chars: if any char is in bidi_controls list [U+202A, U+202B, U+202C, U+202D, U+202E, U+2066, U+2067, U+2068, U+2069, U+200E, U+200F] return Err('contains bidirectional control characters'); (3) filter out ZWS chars [U+200B, U+200C, U+2060]; (4) trim(); (5) if empty return Err('empty after canonicalization'); (6) if chars().count() > 32 return Err('display name too long'); (7) return Ok(normalized). Defensive rules: every error path returns typed Err, no unwrap(), input is untrusted wire data.
acceptance_criteria: cargo test -p nie-relay canonicalize passes; cargo clippy -p nie-relay clean
